subcodes.first_line: Blessed is thy father, inasmuch as he fulfilled the Covenant of God. Verily, unto him belongeth a station in a mighty Book. And blessed art thou, for thou hast become [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لابیک بما وفی بعهد الله ان له مقاما فی کتاب عظیم و طوبی لک بما صرت
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @high station of learning, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
